columns.name: customer
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the owning customer account (customers.id).

columns.name: id
columns.description: Internal numeric contact ID from Invoiced; primary key for the contact table.

columns.name: object
columns.description: Discriminator for the record type; always 'contact' for this sheet.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Full name of the contact person.

columns.name: title
columns.description: Job title or role of the contact (e.g., Owner, Finance Manager).

columns.name: primary
columns.description: Indicates whether this is the primary contact for the customer.

columns.name: sms_enabled
columns.description: Whether SMS notifications are enabled for this contact.

columns.name: department
columns.description: Department or functional area for the contact (e.g., Finance, Procurement).

columns.name: address1
columns.description: Street address line 1 for the contact, usually matching the customer billing address.

columns.name: address2
columns.description: Street address line 2 for the contact.

columns.name: state
columns.description: State or province for the contact's address.

columns.name: postal_code
columns.description: Postal or ZIP code for the contact's address.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country code for the contact's address (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the contact record was created.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the contact record was last updated.
